creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Jason Unovitch from comment #5)
> (In reply to Chris Hutchinson from comment #3)
> Ah.  Would we want to use "x11-themes/gnome-icons-cool-gorilla" since that
> was the original name?  Since it was in ports before, this is going to work
> a little differently as I will have to copy the revision of the original
> port just prior to its deletion.
Ahh. It's been so long now that I could no longer find all the original
details I used to base this off of.
> 
> If we go with the original name I'll just removed the original entry in
> MOVED:
> x11-themes/gnome-icons-cool-gorilla||2011-04-04|Has expired: no mastersite
> 
> If we opt to rename it, we'll update the entry with the new name.
> 
> Knowing that this is a revival of the old port now may mean we will bump
> PORTREVISION of the original port after I copy it.
Given that it's been so long now. There is probably no reason to
think any harm will come of calling this "new". If it's all the same to
you. Why don't we just commit this as is, and call it a new port?

Thank you, Jason, for all your time on this.

--Chris
